title: Combat System — Game Mechanics
description: Create a CombatSystem class with an Enemy class (name, health, attack, loot list). Implement methods: initiate_combat(player, enemy), attack(attacker_health, attacker_attack, defender_health) which returns updated defender health, calculate_damage(base_attack) with random variance, is_defeated(health) to check if health <= 0, and award_loot(player, enemy) to transfer loot items.
test_code:
import random as _random
enemy = Enemy('Goblin', 30, 8, ['gold coin'])
assert enemy.name == 'Goblin', f"Enemy name should be 'Goblin', got '{enemy.name}'"
assert enemy.health == 30, f'Enemy health should be 30, got {enemy.health}'
assert enemy.attack == 8, f'Enemy attack should be 8, got {enemy.attack}'
assert 'gold coin' in enemy.loot, 'Enemy loot should contain gold coin'
combat = CombatSystem()
player = Player('Tester', 'Arena', 100, [], 0)
result = combat.initiate_combat(player, enemy)
assert isinstance(result, str), 'initiate_combat should return a string'
assert len(result) > 0, 'initiate_combat should return a non-empty string'
_random.seed(42)
dmg = combat.calculate_damage(10)
assert isinstance(dmg, int), f'calculate_damage should return int, got {type(dmg).__name__}'
assert 5 <= dmg <= 15, f'Damage for base 10 should be 5-15, got {dmg}'
new_hp = combat.attack(20, 50)
assert isinstance(new_hp, int), 'attack should return int'
assert new_hp < 50, f'attack should reduce health, got {new_hp}'
assert combat.is_defeated(0) is True, 'is_defeated(0) should be True'
assert combat.is_defeated(-5) is True, 'is_defeated(-5) should be True'
assert combat.is_defeated(1) is False, 'is_defeated(1) should be False'
loot_enemy = Enemy('Rat', 10, 3, ['cheese', 'rat tail'])
loot_player = Player('Looter', 'Cave', 100, [], 0)
awarded = combat.award_loot(loot_player, loot_enemy)
assert 'cheese' in awarded, 'award_loot should return cheese'
assert 'rat tail' in awarded, 'award_loot should return rat tail'
assert 'cheese' in loot_player.inventory, 'Player inventory should contain cheese'
assert 'rat tail' in loot_player.inventory, 'Player inventory should contain rat tail'
acceptance_criteria: Enemy class has name, health, attack, and loot (list) attributes
CombatSystem.initiate_combat() returns a non-empty description string
CombatSystem.calculate_damage() returns int between base*0.5 and base*1.5
CombatSystem.attack() reduces defender health by calculated damage
CombatSystem.award_loot() adds enemy loot items to player inventory
hints: Enemy.__init__: self.loot = loot or [] to avoid mutable default
award_loot: loop through enemy.loot, append each to player.inventory
